title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode
notes: Very minor graphical glitches – text characters not in dialog boxes aren’t transparent, and the display flickers when scrolling through news posts. It’s annoying, but still readable. The options to go to the forums or the site appear graphically glitched / not fully readable. Massive frame drops if Steam BPM is on; without it, though, a constant 60 FPS. Very much so playable – ran through a couple of hours of it so far just fine.

title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode
notes: Needed to install xaudio2_0 through xaudio2_9 for sound to work.

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 560 Series (POLARIS11, DRM 3.23.0, 4.15.0-34-generic, LLVM 8.0.0)
notes: Subtitles have uneven black background. Minor fps drops.
title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode

notes: No hack, no particular bugs, nothing to report. Can't judge perf compared to windows, but seem fixed at 60fps without a problem.
title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode

notes: Haven't seen any issues so far, performance is great seeing as I'm running on a pretty low end card
title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode

notes: Only issue I have run into is if I crank the graphics up all the way, the game is too laggy to play but the defaults work fine. Secondly, only issue other than that, is when you are on the "The World" login screen the menu is messed up but anyone who has played the game before knows the menu so it isn't hard to work around this 1 little issue where everything else works perfectly.
title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode

notes: the game launches and functions fine (no missing textures, audio/controller/overlay all work, as does alt-tabbing) however the performance is lacking. steady 60FPS can be maintained in some areas but in places like the main city it can drop to as low as 23FPS, which is a big deal since as an early report stated the game logic is tied to framerate. you can mitigate this a bit by pointing the camera down to the ground, but ultimately the game needs some work before it can be considered gold/platinum.
title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode

notes: Runs out of the box.  Only issue spotted until now is display glitches on the  "news" screen  : text sometimes dissapear,  making  it scroll up or down make it show up again.
title: .hack//G.U. Last Recode

notes: Only one minor issue : news display sometimes get wrong... scrolling up and down restore it. More than 22h on the game and still  no other problem.
